description: Live well options for the selected fleet and pad.
sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT name AS label, name AS value, well_family, fleet_name, pad_name, COALESCE(NULLIF(fleet_name, ''), 'Unknown') AS fleet_name_option, COALESCE(NULLIF(pad_name, ''), 'Unknown') AS pad_name_option, well_id, api_num, sample_count, first_record_ts, last_record_ts FROM featurestore:live_well_index_v1 WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(fleet_name, ''), 'Unknown') = :fleet_name AND COALESCE(NULLIF(pad_name, ''), 'Unknown') = :pad_name ORDER BY name) q
